name: skc-vs-tools
description: Applies the SKC preset: user settings (incl. MCP servers) and required extensions.
_comment: Note: Extension visibility (public/private) is managed via VS Code Marketplace web UI. Extensions are private by default. To change visibility, visit: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/manage/publishers/SKConsultingSA/extensions/skc-vs-tools/hub

skc.skipInstalledExtensions.description: Skip reinstalling extensions that are already present.

skc.presetFilePath.description: Optional path to a JSON preset file. If set, the file is read on activation/command to overlay settings and extensions. Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder.

skc.mcpFilePath.description: Optional path to a JSON file that defines only MCP servers. If set, it replaces the built-in mcp.servers. Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder. Special value: 'cursor-global' resolves to the global Cursor MCP file (~/.cursor/mcp.json).

skc.extensionsFilePath.description: Optional path to a JSON file that defines additional extensions to install. Unioned with the built-in list. Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder.

skc.showNewsOnStartup.description: Show news notification on VS Code startup, especially when a new version is detected.

skc.autoOpenNewsPage.description: Automatically open the news page in full view on startup instead of showing a notification. Requires 'showNewsOnStartup' to be enabled.

skc.newsFilePath.description: Path to a markdown file containing news/updates. Shown on startup when enabled. Relative paths resolve from the extension folder or workspace.

scripts.package: npm run sync:extensions && tsc -p ./ && vsce package
scripts.publish:patch: npm run compile && node scripts/publish.js patch
scripts.publish:minor: npm run compile && node scripts/publish.js minor
scripts.publish:major: npm run compile && node scripts/publish.js major
